title: Implement URL Shortener REST API

steps.description: Develop the core domain model representing URLs.
steps.done_condition: Domain model implemented with components representing URLs.

steps.description: Define ports for the URL shortening functionality.
steps.done_condition: Ports for URL shortening defined and tested.

steps.description: Implement in-memory storage mechanisms for URL handling.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage implemented and able to store URLs.

steps.description: Implement use cases for transforming long URLs to shortened forms.
steps.done_condition: Use cases for URL shortening implemented and passing tests.

steps.description: Develop primary REST API endpoints for URL shortening in main.go.
steps.done_condition: REST API endpoints implemented and ready for testing.

steps.description: Wire all components in composition root.
steps.done_condition: All components wired correctly and application starts without errors.

steps.description: Implement integration tests for the entire URL shortener feature.

successCriteria: URL shortening feature works as intended.
